prerequisiteDocs: Backend planning package for FE-16: docs/features/FE-16-llm-feedback

ValidationMessageSnippets: Notes khong duoc vuot qua 4000 ky tu.
Ban khong phai chu so huu cua test suite nay.
Khong the feedback suggestion cho test suite da archived.
Khong the feedback suggestion da superseded.

notes: signal parse case-insensitive va duoc trim whitespace truoc khi validate enum.
notes duoc trim dau/cuoi; chuoi rong hoac whitespace-only se thanh null khi luu.
rowVersion nay thuoc feedback row, khong phai suggestion row.
updatedDateTime = null tren lan tao dau tien; se co gia tri sau cac lan overwrite tiep theo.
lastFeedbackAt lay theo max cua UpdatedDateTime ?? CreatedDateTime tren tat ca feedback rows cua suggestion.
Neu chua co feedback nao thi backend tra object voi 2 count = 0 va lastFeedbackAt = null.
currentUserFeedback = null neu user hien tai chua tung feedback suggestion do.
Generate/review response cua FE-15 hien tai thuong de 2 field nay = null do khong qua query hydration.
FE-16 write flow hien tai khong co conflict reason code rieng.
Non-owner access hien map thanh 400 thay vi 403.

readSurfaceExtensions.name: LlmSuggestionFeedbackReadModel
notes: FE nen doc feedback state tu 2 route GET nay; khong co GET feedback route rieng.
feedbackSummary aggregate theo tat ca user feedback rows tren suggestion hien tai.

endpoints.name: UpsertLlmSuggestionFeedback
problemCases: 400 ValidationProblemDetails khi body malformed JSON, missing signal, signal vuot max length 20, hoac notes vuot max length 4000 theo data annotation bind-time.
400 ProblemDetails khi signal khong nam trong Helpful|NotHelpful, non-owner access, suite archived, hoac suggestion da Superseded.
404 khi suiteId khong ton tai hoac suggestionId khong thuoc suite hien tai.
Khong co 409 concurrency contract tren FE-16 write path hien tai.
notes: Server luon upsert theo current user; khong co userId trong request.
Neu feedback row da ton tai thi backend overwrite signal/notes, cap nhat UpdatedDateTime, va tao RowVersion moi.
Response chi tra feedback row sau khi write, khong tra lai feedbackSummary moi.

runtimeRules: Owner check dua tren suite.CreatedById, khong dua tren reviewedById hay feedback.userId trong request.
Feedback write duoc phep cho moi suggestion trong suite mien la suggestion chua bi Superseded.
Khong co delete endpoint; cung mot PUT duoc dung de tao moi, overwrite signal, sua note, hoac clear note bang chuoi rong/whitespace.
List/detail query cua FE-15 hydrate currentUserFeedback bang feedback row cua user hien tai va feedbackSummary bang aggregate cua tat ca user.
Generate/review response cua FE-15 khong hydrate 2 field feedback nay vi map truc tiep tu entity raw.
Feedback aggregate duoc dua vao feedback context theo endpoint va feedback fingerprint de thay doi cache key cho cac lan generate boundary/negative suggestions ve sau.
Feedback moi khong tu dong mutate suggestion content hien co; muon thay doi suggestion list thi FE van phai theo generate/list flow cua FE-15.

helpfulRequest.notes: Scenario nay bat trung bug da thay tren staging.

notHelpfulRequest.notes: Expectation hien tai khong phu hop voi business rule moi.

relatedNotes: Neu UI dang o FE-15 list/detail screen, FE-16 co the duoc implement ma khong can them read endpoint moi.
Sau feedback write, neu can summary chinh xac ngay lap tuc thi refetch list/detail la cach don gian va an toan nhat.
Feedback nay co anh huong toi nhung lan generate suggestion moi thong qua feedback fingerprint, nhung khong thay doi suggestion rows hien co.
